text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Please review the moderator guidelines in #moderator-resources.
Welcome @guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Check out #event-planning for upcoming community events.
Welcome @mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Please introduce yourself in #mentor-intros and review the mentorship program.
Welcome @newbie_kim! You've been approved as a community member. Please read #community-rules and introduce yourself in #introductions.
